title: kalmia angustifolia subsp. carolina
intro: Kalmia angustifolia subsp. carolina, also known as the mountain laurel or calico bush, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Kalmia angustifolia subsp. carolina include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
